# Mobazha Documentation

> Canonical task-oriented documentation for people and agents using, operating, integrating, or evaluating Mobazha.

Status: Beta knowledge surface. Pages marked Draft are not shipped guarantees.
Runtime authority: the connected backend's version and advertised capabilities.
Policy authority: the reviewed public source linked from each page.

## Start
- [Overview](/start)
- [Sell](/sell)
- [Buy](/buy)

## Operate
- [Self-host](/self-host)
- [Bind an account](/self-host/bind-account)
- [Backup and upgrade](/self-host/backup-and-upgrade)

## Build
- [Developer overview](/build)
- [API policy](/build/api)
- [MCP and agents](/build/mcp)
- [Webhooks](/build/webhooks)
- [Source reference](/reference)

## Project and trust
- [Architecture](/project/architecture)

- [Fees and economics](/project/fees)
- [Release scope](/project/release-scope)
- [Governance](/project/governance)
- [Releases](/releases)

- [Discovery manifest](/.well-known/mobazha-docs.json)
